reviews.review_msg: Martin is the hottest prof at SFU. His course is tough and requires a lot of participation but his lectures are interesting and participation heavy. He cares about his students.

In the four years I've been at SFU, Dr. Martin Bouchard is definitely a prof I would recommend. He's funny, energetic, caring, and you actually walk away learning some pretty interesting stuff. In all honesty, you'd have to be a complete fool to fail his class - he makes lectures interesting and makes coming to school worth it! Take his class!

Great prof, lectures are interesting and engaging most of the time. Participation is worth a lot so don't take his class if you don't want to come to class and contribute. Very very easy marker, it's not tough to do well

Lots of work required for this course-weekly readings & graded on participation in lectures. His multiple choice tests are difficult. However, his lectures are fairly interesting & Martin is smoking hot.
Prof is quite disorganized at times. but he makes up for it very well because he is so open and kind towards feedback. TA was also great.

Favourite class of my undergrad and a great way to end my last semester! Dr McConnell was so engaging and somewhat laid-back with lecturing yet they're so informative and makes it exciting to go every week. If I could take another one of his courses, I would do so in a heartbeat.
Weekly readings and posts but graded very fairly and lenient. Great prof, funny lectures that you actually want to be there for. Highly recommend

Dr McConnell is an amazing prof that is very passionate about the courses he teaches! Although a lot of reading, he provides interesting ones and there is no textbook to purchase. I highly recommend taking a class with him if you get the opportunity.
